input.command:
echo "=== Is /Applications/coh a symlink or real dir? ==="
readlink /Applications/coh || echo "  (not a symlink)"
echo "inode of /Applications/coh:                 $(stat -f '%i  dev=%d' /Applications/coh 2>/dev/null)"
echo "inode of ~/Library/.../LaunchCat/coh:        $(stat -f '%i  dev=%d' ~/Library/Application\ Support/LaunchCat/coh 2>/dev/null)"
echo
echo "=== size on disk of each (real duplicate check) ==="
echo "/Applications/coh:"; du -sh /Applications/coh 2>/dev/null
echo "~/Library/.../LaunchCat/coh:"; du -sh ~/Library/Application\ Support/LaunchCat/coh 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "=== does /Applications/coh contain the big assets too? ==="
du -sh /Applications/coh/assets /Applications/coh/wine 2>/dev/null
echo
echo "=== CoHModdingTool.app: what does the applet run? ==="
ls -la /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Resources/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- Scripts dir ---"
ls -la /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Resources/Scripts/ 2>/dev/null
echo "--- decompile main.scpt (applet source) ---"
osadecompile /Applications/CoHModdingTool.app/Contents/Resources/Scripts/main.scpt 2>/dev/null | head -60 || echo "  (could not decompile — may be a shell droplet)"
input.description: Resolve /Applications/coh symlink status and CoHModdingTool applet source
